source.title: Acute coronary syndromes
source.population: Adults with acute coronary syndromes, including people treated with percutaneous coronary intervention after myocardial infarction.
source.setting: Acute cardiology, discharge, cardiac rehabilitation, and post-myocardial-infarction follow-up.
source.exclusions: Exact for post-acute-coronary-syndrome and post-myocardial-infarction PCI care; partial for a generic post-PCI workflow because not every PCI follows acute coronary syndrome.

exact_location.heading: PCI and antithrombotic-risk recommendations

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports PCI context and clinician-led bleeding, thromboembolic, cardiovascular, and antithrombotic-risk review without mapping medicine names or doses into generated content.

items.final_wording: Supports a clear post-MI management plan, blood-pressure and renal monitoring, and bleeding-risk assessment at follow-up.

source.title: Cardiovascular disease: risk assessment and reduction, including lipid modification
source.population: Adults receiving cardiovascular risk assessment or lipid-modification review for primary or secondary prevention.
source.setting: Primary care and other clinician-led cardiovascular prevention services.
source.exclusions: Exact for adult cardiovascular risk and lipid-modification assessment and monitoring; international only and not directly validated for UAE pathways.

exact_location.heading: Recommendations 1.4.1–1.5.7 — lipid assessment and baseline tests

source.evidence_paraphrase: Supports full lipid profile, blood pressure, BMI, diabetes status, renal function, liver transaminases, thyroid context, muscle symptoms, and clinician-led specialist assessment.
